title: The Unequal Marriage,
content:
Even this heavenly pair were unequally match'd when united:

    Psyche grew older and wise, Amor remain'd still a child,
meaning:
Johann Wolfgang von Goethe's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Unequal Marriage,"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
